definition: A professional cook.
sentence_context: The chef prepared a gourmet meal.

definition: An attractively arranged bunch of flowers.
sentence_context: He gave her a beautiful bouquet of roses.

definition: A building for housing a motor vehicle.
sentence_context: I parked the car in the garage.

definition: A paved outdoor area adjoining a house.
sentence_context: We had lunch on the patio.

definition: An artistic dance form.
sentence_context: She has been practicing ballet since she was five.

definition: A small restaurant selling light meals and drinks.
sentence_context: Let us meet at the cafe for coffee.

definition: A man to whom someone is engaged to be married.
sentence_context: She introduced me to her fiance.

definition: An Italian dish of a flat crust topped with tomatoes and cheese.
sentence_context: We ordered a large pepperoni pizza.

definition: A Mexican dish consisting of a folded tortilla filled with meat and beans.
sentence_context: I would like a beef taco, please.

definition: An afternoon rest or nap.
sentence_context: In some countries, people take a siesta after lunch.

definition: A public square or marketplace.
sentence_context: The fountain is in the center of the plaza.

definition: A slender long-legged fly.
sentence_context: I got a mosquito bite on my arm.

definition: A large keyboard musical instrument.
sentence_context: He plays the piano beautifully.

definition: A dramatic work in one or more acts, set to music.
sentence_context: We went to see an opera last night.

definition: A thing done by one person unaccompanied.
sentence_context: She sang a beautiful solo.

definition: The speed at which a passage of music is played.
sentence_context: The song has a very fast tempo.

definition: A machine capable of carrying out a complex series of actions automatically.
sentence_context: The robot performed the task perfectly.

definition: An expedition to observe animals in their natural habitat.
sentence_context: They went on a safari in Africa.

definition: A system of unarmed combat using hands and feet.
sentence_context: He is a black belt in karate.

definition: A long high sea wave caused by an earthquake.
sentence_context: The tsunami caused widespread damage.

definition: Graduates or former students of a particular school.
sentence_context: The alumni gathered for a reunion.

definition: A market in a Middle Eastern country.
sentence_context: We bought spices at the bazaar.

definition: A deep gorge, typically one with a river flowing through it.
sentence_context: The Grand Canyon is a spectacular sight.

definition: A small sweet baked treat.

definition: A sturdy cotton twill fabric, typically blue.
sentence_context: My jacket is made of denim.

definition: The easing of hostility or strained relations.
sentence_context: The two countries reached a detente.

definition: The face of a building.
sentence_context: The building has a beautiful marble facade.

definition: An influential teacher or popular expert.
sentence_context: He is a technology guru.

definition: A Japanese poem of seventeen syllables.
sentence_context: I wrote a haiku about nature.

definition: Meat that has been cut into strips and dried.
sentence_context: I like to eat beef jerky.

definition: A small open-fronted hut or cubicle.

definition: A drink made from lemon juice and sugar.
sentence_context: I drank a glass of cold lemonade.

definition: Showing aggressive pride in one's masculinity.
sentence_context: He tried to act macho.

definition: A dish originally from Italy consisting of dough made from durum wheat.
sentence_context: I am having pasta for dinner.

definition: A crisp biscuit baked in the form of a knot.

definition: A fixed share of something that a person or group is entitled to receive.
sentence_context: The team reached its monthly quota.

definition: A spicy tomato sauce.

definition: A wealthy, powerful person in business or industry.

definition: A semi-solid sourish food prepared from milk fermented by added bacteria.
sentence_context: I had yogurt with fruit for breakfast.

definition: An African wild horse with black-and-white stripes.
sentence_context: We saw a zebra at the zoo.
